name: Windows Update and Patch Activity
description: Tracks Windows Update downloads, installations, failures, and uninstalls. Essential for identifying unpatched systems, failed critical patches, and suspicious KB uninstalls that may expose vulnerabilities. Cross-reference with CVE databases using KB numbers.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.19: Update download succeeded — UpdateTitle (KB number), UpdateRevisionNumber
event_descriptions.20: Update download FAILED — UpdateTitle, ErrorCode. Critical patches repeatedly failing = vulnerability exposure.
event_descriptions.21: Update installation succeeded — UpdateTitle (KB number applied), RebootRequired
event_descriptions.23: Update installation FAILED — UpdateTitle, ErrorCode. System remains unpatched.
event_descriptions.26: Update not applicable to this system
event_descriptions.27: Update marked as permanently not applicable
event_descriptions.1009: Update was uninstalled — UpdateTitle, KB number. Suspicious if security update removed.
